ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user's role */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended, deleted) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "verification_token" TEXT /* Token used for account verification */,
  "is_verified" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the user's account is verified */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "birthday" TEXT /* Birthday of the user */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL or path to the user's profile picture */,
  "last_password_change" TEXT /* Date and time when the user last changed their password */,
  "failed_login_attempts" INTEGER /* Number of failed login attempts */,
  "lockout_time" TEXT /* Date and time when the account is locked out */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., user, admin, support) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON object of permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user associated with the session */,
  "session_token" TEXT /* Token used to identify the session */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user during the session */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent information for the session */,
  "login_time" TEXT /* Date and time when the session started */,
  "logout_time" TEXT /* Date and time when the session ended */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the session is currently active */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of the device used for the session (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "device_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the device */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user during the session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_sessions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_activities" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the activity */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of the activity (e.g., login, logout, update_profile) */,
  "activity_details" TEXT /* Details about the activity */,
  "activity_time" TEXT /* Date and time when the activity occurred */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the session associated with the activity */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address associated with the activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activities_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES user_sessions ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activities_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_groups" (
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each group */,
  "group_name" TEXT /* Name of the group (e.g., marketing, engineering, sales) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the group */,
  "parent_group_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent group (for hierarchical structures) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the group */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the group was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the group */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the group was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_group_memberships" (
  "membership_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each membership */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user in the membership */,
  "group_id" INTEGER /* ID of the group the user is a member of */,
  "joined_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user joined the group */,
  "left_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user left the group */,
  "invited_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who invited the user to the group */,
  "invitation_time" TEXT /* Date and time when the user was invited to the group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("membership_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_group_memberships_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("group_id") REFERENCES user_groups ("group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_group_memberships_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_group_memberships_invited_by FOREIGN KEY ("invited_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_preferences" (
  "preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each preference */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user associated with the preference */,
  "preference_key" TEXT /* Key of the preference (e.g., theme, language) */,
  "preference_value" TEXT /* Value of the preference */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the preference was set */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the preference was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user whose account was changed */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., create, update, delete) */,
  "details" TEXT /* Details of the action */,
  "log_time" TEXT /* Date and time when the action occurred */,
  "performed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address associated with the action */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent information for the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_performed_by FOREIGN KEY ("performed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "password_reset_requests" (
  "request_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each password reset request */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user requesting a password reset */,
  "reset_token" TEXT /* Token used to reset the password */,
  "expires_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the token expires */,
  "is_used" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the token has been used */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who initiated the password reset request */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the request was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_password_reset_requests_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_password_reset_requests_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_verifications" (
  "verification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each verification request */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user being verified */,
  "verification_token" TEXT /* Token used for account verification */,
  "expires_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the token expires */,
  "is_used" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the token has been used */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who initiated the verification request */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the request was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("verification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_verifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_verifications_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user providing feedback */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Text of the feedback or suggestion */,
  "feedback_time" TEXT /* Date and time when the feedback was submitted */,
  "is_resolved" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the feedback has been resolved */,
  "resolved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who resolved the feedback */,
  "resolved_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the feedback was resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_feedback_resolved_by FOREIGN KEY ("resolved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of the notification (e.g., system, security, update) */,
  "notification_text" TEXT /* Text of the notification */,
  "notification_time" TEXT /* Date and time when the notification was sent */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the notification has been read */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the notification */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the notification was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_notifications_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
